articles.title: How Google Revolutionized Search and Changed the Internet Forever
articles.subtitle: From a Simple Search Box to the World's Most Powerful Technology Company
articles.author: Oroka Conner
articles.description: Google's incredible journey from a Stanford dorm room to global technology leader. Discover how PageRank revolutionized search, how Google's innovations changed the world, and why they're leading the AI revolution for the benefit of humanity.
articles.imageQuery: professional photograph of Google headquarters Mountain View campus, modern glass buildings, Google logo, innovation and technology, clean architectural design, corporate campus, tech company headquarters, professional business photography

articles.title: The 2025 Housing Crash: Why Millennials Will Never Own a Home
articles.subtitle: Boomers Stole Your Future - And Bankers Are Laughing All the Way to the Bank
articles.author: Oroka Conner
articles.description: The American Dream is dead. Millennials and Gen Z are being priced out of homeownership forever. Boomers hoarded wealth, bankers engineered poverty, and politicians enabled it all. The 2025 housing crash exposes the generational theft destroying the middle class.
articles.imageQuery: dramatic photojournalism of young couple looking at for sale sign on expensive house they can't afford, economic despair, housing crisis, millennials struggling financially, high contrast, professional editorial photography, emotional impact, real estate collapse symbolism

articles.title: AI Just Fired 10 Million Americans: Your Job Is Next
articles.subtitle: The Robots Are Coming For You - And Your Boss Is Cheering
articles.author: Oroka Conner
articles.description: AI has fired 10 million Americans in 2025 alone. Your job is next. The brutal truth about automation, corporate greed, and the human cost of the AI revolution that's destroying lives while making billionaires richer.
articles.imageQuery: AI automation job losses, robots taking jobs, unemployment crisis, workers protest, technology unemployment, photojournalism, editorial photography

articles.title: How AI Isn't Stealing Our Water, Golf Is
articles.subtitle: The Real Water Thieves: Manicured Lawns and Perfect Lies
articles.author: Oroka Conner
articles.description: A satirical look at water usage, revealing that while AI gets blamed for water consumption, golf courses are the true culprits draining our precious resources. The numbers don't lie: golf uses 200 times more water than AI annually.
articles.imageQuery: golf course water usage, sprinkler systems, dry lake bed, environmental impact, photojournalism, editorial photography

articles.title: 2025 Budget Cuts: How Healthcare, Medicare, Medicaid, and Food Assistance Programs Are Affecting Millions of Americans
articles.subtitle: 17 Million Americans Losing Coverage, 51,000+ Additional Deaths Projected Annually
articles.author: Oroka Conner
articles.description: The 2025 federal budget legislation and government shutdown have triggered unprecedented changes affecting 17 million Americans' health insurance coverage and over 51,000 additional deaths annually. Critical analysis of Medicare cuts, Medicaid work requirements, ACA subsidies elimination, and SNAP benefits reductions.
articles.imageQuery: government building healthcare crisis, medical protest budget cuts, hospital emergency, healthcare policy, Medicare Medicaid, photojournalism, editorial photography

articles.title: How Wall Street Steals From Every Worker in America
articles.subtitle: The Stock Market's Greatest Scam: Your Labor, Their Profit
articles.author: Oroka Conner
articles.description: Meet Maria, who cleans corporate offices for $12 an hour while shareholders extract millions from her labor. This is how the stock market has become a sophisticated wealth extraction machine that turns worker productivity into shareholder profits.

articles.subtitle: How Rich People Are Suffocating Our Nation
articles.author: Oroka Conner
